items.title: Experts dispute US account of deadly Iran sports hall strike in Lamerd
items.summary: Six weapons experts have contested the US claim that video evidence suggests an Iranian missile could have hit the hall.

items.title: Artemis II leaves Earth's orbit on track for far side of the Moon
items.summary: The mission's last, big push on its lunar journey takes humans out of the Earth's orbit for the first time since 1972.

items.title: France's Muslim gathering ban overturned by courts
items.summary: The Paris police department had argued that the four-day gathering was a security threat because it could be a target of terrorism.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 與以色列、烏克蘭總統通話 教宗良十四世呼籲和平
items.summary: 羅馬天主教宗良十四世今天分別與以色列、烏克蘭總統通話，討論當前戰爭情勢及和平的必要性。  法新社報導，梵蒂岡表示，美國出生的教宗良十四世（Pope Leo XIV）分別與以色列總統赫佐格...…

items.title: 不只協助反無人機 澤倫斯基：烏克蘭經驗可助重開荷姆茲海峽
items.summary: 烏克蘭總統澤倫斯基（Volodymyr Zelenskyy）2日表示，願意提供烏克蘭維護黑海航行自由的經驗，協助給正在考慮如何在當前中東衝突期間，維持荷姆茲海峽開放的國家。 ...…

items.title: 川普宣示再打伊朗2至3週  官員示警：可打擊目標所剩無幾
items.summary: 政治新聞網站「Politico」引述現任與前任國防官員指出，即便美國總統川普堅稱會在接下來2至3週持續重擊德黑蘭，但美軍能夠打擊的重要戰略目標卻所剩無幾。  兩名現任國防官...…
